texto: There has been enough suffering in our country, there has been enough of children whose dreams die before they have a chance to grow and there has been enough of our elders who, having served their nation, are forced into indignity in their old age.
explicacao: Citação de John Agyekum Kufuor sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “There has been enough suffering in our country, there has been enough of children whose dreams di…” articula motivacao, children, age em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como age e old-age.
